title: Admin diverges after reconnect: UserJoined order != connection_seq order
description: Existing clients track online list by appending on UserJoined / removing on UserLeft. Two clients receiving UserJoined(Charlie) and UserJoined(Dave) in different orders will place them at different positions — admin = online[0] diverges across peers. Relay sends a correct connection_seq-ordered DirectoryList only to the newly connecting client; existing clients never re-sync. Triggered whenever two clients connect in rapid succession and a previous admin disconnects. Bad behavior: two clients elect different admins, both try to create/advance the MLS group epoch, epoch collision.
close_reason: Added sequence: u64 to UserInfo (DirectoryList) and UserJoined. Relay fills sequence from connection_seq() in both places. Client now maintains online_seq: HashMap<String,u64> and inserts UserJoined events via partition_point() to keep online sorted ascending by sequence. online[0] is now consistent across all peers regardless of UserJoined arrival order.
